vision_report.compositional_truth_check: The registry is largely invalidated by the visual evidence. P1 (String of Nickels) and P2/P4 (Mexican Mint/Silver Guest) are not visible as established specimens. The pots contain only soil and debris. P3 (Pothos) is represented only by the anchor (white rabbit) and a single, isolated sprout.

inventory_reconciliation.P1: Systemic Loss: No plant material detected in the yellow pot.
inventory_reconciliation.P2: Systemic Loss: No plant material detected in the black pot.
inventory_reconciliation.P3: Systemic Loss: The Pothos is absent; only a single, unidentified sprout remains.
inventory_reconciliation.P4: Systemic Loss: No plant material detected.

plant_audit.P1: Empty soil surface, no signs of life.
plant_audit.P2: Empty soil surface, no signs of life.
plant_audit.P3: Contains a single, small, pale green sprout (likely a seedling or remnant).
plant_audit.P4: Empty soil surface, no signs of life.

biome_observations.soil_texture: Consistently dark and damp across all pots; no signs of cracking.
biome_observations.debris: Presence of white, crystalline or shell-like fragments on the surface of P3.
biome_observations.desk_surface: A red object (likely a scoop or tool) appears in the CURRENT image, representing a new intervention.

temporal_deltas.earliest_to_t-2: No significant change; pots remain largely barren.
temporal_deltas.t-2_to_t-1: Lighting shift to low-spectrum/blue-tinted; visibility of plant matter is near zero.
temporal_deltas.t-1_to_current: Return to standard lighting; introduction of a red tool near the yellow pot.

vision_report.visual_health_inference: The biome is in a state of near-total systemic collapse. The absence of the registered species suggests either complete mortality or a failure of the initial planting. The single sprout in P3 is the only indicator of biological activity, though it is insufficient to support the registry's claim of a Pothos.
anomalies: New Introduction: Red tool/scoop in the CURRENT frame.
Anomaly: White debris/fragments in P3 soil.
Anomaly: Total absence of registered flora.
vision_report.narrative_description: I have performed a multi-stage audit of the provided image sequence. My first step was to establish a baseline against the provided registry, followed by a pixel-by-pixel inspection of the soil surfaces. I validated my findings by comparing the lighting-adjusted frames to the current state. The biome is effectively dormant or dead, with the exception of one minor, unidentifiable sprout. The registry is currently inaccurate regarding the presence of the listed plants.
